comments.text:
All providers are playing with us. I am deeply dissatisfied with Aditya Birla’s handling of my post-hospitalization claim. Despite submitting all required documents within 75 days of discharge and fully declaring all details, my claim was unfairly rejected.


My policy clearly covers post-hospitalization expenses for up to 60 days, and my submission adhered to this timeframe. The rejection feels completely unjustified, especially given that I was temporarily out of my usual location, which caused a minor delay in submission.


This experience has been frustrating and has left me questioning the reliability of Aditya Birla Capital. I have a ₹1 crore cover for which I pay a hefty premium, yet for an ₹8,000 claim, I had to go through such an ordeal.


While they are proactive with renewal calls and follow-ups post-discharge, they fail to deliver on the core promise of health insurance—assistance when you need it most. This has shattered my trust in their service. I cannot recommend Aditya Birla Capital to anyone looking for dependable health insurance.


Claim ID 1112485290717/01 

Aditya Birla Health Insurance- Activ Assure Active Assure - Diamond plan

Policy Number 23-20-0021662-01
